```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct UserData {
    uint64_t user_id;
    uint8_t age;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& stream) {
        stream(user_id, age, name);
    }
};

UserData deserialize_user_data(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Cast away the constness of the buffer
    std::span<uint8_t> non_const_buffer = const_cast<std::span<uint8_t>>(buffer);
    
    // Create a buffer adaptor for the non-const buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>> adaptor(non_const_buffer);
    
    // Create a binary stream from the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream stream(adaptor);
    
    // Create a UserData object and deserialize into it
    UserData user_data;
    stream.deserialise(user_data);
    
    return user_data;
}
```

```cpp
}
```

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

struct UserData {
    uint32_t user_id;
    std::string name;
    
    void serialise(auto& adaptor) {
        adaptor(user_id, name);
    }
};

std::vector<uint8_t> write_and_serialise_packet(uint32_t header, const UserData& data) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::buffer_adaptor adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    stream << header;
    stream << data;

    return buffer;
}
```

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(std::span<uint8_t> buffer) {
    // Create a buffer_adaptor from the buffer
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

    // Create a binary_stream from the adaptor
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    // Read the header
    uint32_t header;
    stream >> header;

    // Read the null-terminated string
    std::string_view message = stream.view();

    return {header, message};
}
```

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>
#include <string_view>

struct MessagePacket {
    uint32_t header;
    std::string_view message;
};

MessagePacket read_header_and_message(std::span<uint8_t> buffer) {
    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::span<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);
    hexi::binary_stream<decltype(adaptor)> stream(adaptor);

    uint32_t header;
    stream >> header;

    std::string_view message = stream.view();

    return {header, message};
}
```
